items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the integration with payroll systems.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the integration with payroll systems, as specified in the use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this integration is implemented or operational. The linked use case outlines the need for this feature but lacks concrete evidence of its existence or functionality, leading to an inconclusive status.
